completed_tasks.name: Pure-function config core (schema + wizard helpers + validate + setter)
CLI wizard + config subcommands + preflight middleware
Drop hardcoded wizard model default — required prompt with hint
Narrow preflight gate to interactive entry points only (Chat | bare hermes)
First-run wizard renders D-16 framing + chat resume after wizard
config show Learning Loop banner toggles + cache-break warning
Verifier confirms CFG-01/02/03 PASS + 4/4 ROADMAP success criteria

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 23 was final phase in milestone v2.1 — check milestone completion via /gsd-next or /gsd-audit-milestone v2.1

human_actions_pending.action: Decide on advisory gates: run /gsd-code-review 23 + /gsd-secure-phase 23 before milestone close, or defer
human_actions_pending.context: workflow has both gates enabled; neither blocks structural completion but security_enforcement=true means SECURITY.md is expected before milestone close

decisions.decision: Wizard has no hardcoded model default — required prompt with hint (e.g. openai/gpt-4o-mini)
decisions.rationale: Iterated through openrouter/qwen-2.5-coder-32b (404 invalid ID), qwen/qwen-2.5-coder-32b-instruct (404 entitlement), qwen/qwen3-coder:free (429 rate limit). Hardcoded defaults age fast and create bad first-run UX when accounts can't access them. Required prompt forces user to land on a model their account supports.

decisions.decision: Preflight gate fires only when matches!(cli.command, Some(Chat) | None) && cli.execute.is_none()
decisions.rationale: Plan 02's original 'skip for setup/config' inverted the contract — it triggered wizard on every CLI subcommand including skills/mcp/cron/memory/doctor, which EOFd on stdin in test runs. Caught by post-merge skills_cmd_integration test failure.

decisions.decision: config_show_redaction.rs YAML fixture left with stale 'openrouter/qwen-2.5-coder-32b' literal
decisions.rationale: That literal is arbitrary fixture content for the redaction test — it doesn't assert on the wizard's hardcoded default and the test passes regardless. Touching it would be churn.

next_action: Run /gsd-next to route — milestone v2.1 may be ready for /gsd-audit-milestone or /gsd-complete-milestone. Optionally run /gsd-code-review 23 and /gsd-secure-phase 23 first.
context_notes: Phase 23 fully landed: config schema + wizard + CLI subcommands + preflight, with 65 phase tests + 23 integration tests + manual UAT all green. Two regression fixes were applied post-merge (model default + preflight gate scope). Pre-existing handlers.rs cron-stub assertion failure (Phase 22.4.2.1, commit 96b19c1) is acknowledged in 23-VERIFICATION.md as out-of-scope; resuming agent should NOT treat it as a phase 23 regression. The session iterated extensively on UAT 1b — root cause turned out to be a layered issue (wrong ID → entitlement → rate limit) that justified switching to a no-default design rather than picking a specific model.
